nav.configuratorDesc: Build a custom product from parts

catalog.title: Product Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Browse playground equipment families and their variants. Configure a custom assembly or add a known variant straight to the invoice.
catalog.noMatchesDesc: Try clearing the search or selecting a different category.
catalog.emptyDesc: Add products via Catalog Management, or import from an Excel template.

configurator.title: Part-Based Configurator
configurator.subtitle: Compose a playground product from individual parts. The total updates live and we'll suggest a matching catalog variant if your combination matches one.
configurator.pickFamily: Pick a product family to begin
configurator.pickFamilyDesc: Select a family above to view its configurable parts.
configurator.requiredMissing: Required parts are missing — add them before adding to invoice.
configurator.noPartsSelected: No parts selected yet. Pick parts on the left to start building.
configurator.exactMatchDesc: This configuration matches the catalog variant
configurator.partialMatchDesc: Variant {{sku}} is close to your current selection.

invoice.title: Invoice Builder
invoice.subtitle: Review your configured products, set customer & tax details, and export a customer-facing PDF.
invoice.noLines: No line items yet. Add products from the Catalog or Configurator.
invoice.notesPlaceholder: Payment terms, delivery notes, thank-you message…

import.title: Bulk Excel Import
import.subtitle: Download the template, fill it in with your product data, and upload it back to replace the catalog in bulk. Every row is validated before anything is written.
import.uploadDesc: Drag and drop the filled .xlsx file here, or use the picker below.
import.importedSummary: Successfully imported {{families}} families and {{variants}} variants. Current catalog size: {{familiesTotal}} families, {{variantsTotal}} variants.
import.mergedBoth: Merged: {{created}} new families added, {{updated}} existing families updated. Current catalog: {{familiesTotal}} families, {{variantsTotal}} variants.
import.mergedCreated: Added {{created}} new families. Current catalog: {{familiesTotal}} families, {{variantsTotal}} variants.
import.mergedUpdated: Updated {{updated}} existing families. Current catalog: {{familiesTotal}} families, {{variantsTotal}} variants.
import.modeMergeDesc: Keep existing catalog items. Update families by code, add new variants by SKU. Existing items not in the file are preserved.
import.modeReplaceDesc: Clear the entire catalog and replace it with only the imported rows. Existing items not in the file will be lost.
import.conflictDuplicateCode: Duplicate family code in file — only the first row will be used
import.conflictDuplicateSku: Duplicate variant SKU in file — only the first row will be used
import.conflictNameMismatch: Same family name used with a different code — may cause confusion
import.formatReferenceDesc: Every cell format used by the importer.
import.formatReferenceCatalogDesc: One row per variant. Parts and images are encoded as delimited strings inside a single cell.
import.formatReferenceCustomersDesc: One row per customer. All fields are plain text — no special encoding needed.
import.formatReferenceSettingsDesc: The JSON bundle has 4 optional sections. Each section is independent — you can include only the ones you want to apply.
import.formatReferenceSettingsReceiptLayoutNote: Order of elements on the receipt. Each item needs id, type, visible.
import.formatReferenceSettingsCurrencyNotes: rates must include USD, TRY, EUR as finite numbers. base is one of USD|TRY|EUR.
import.formatReferenceSettingsFavoritesNotes: Variant IDs to mark as favorite. Replaces the existing list.
import.customerColumnsNote: All customer columns are plain text. Leave optional fields blank if not applicable.
import.step1Desc: The .xlsx workbook contains a Products sheet with column headers and an example row, plus a Reference sheet listing valid categories and formats.
import.step2Desc: Drag and drop the filled .xlsx file here, or use the picker below.
import.oneOfValues: One of the values on the Reference sheet
import.step1DescCustomers: The .xlsx workbook contains a Customers sheet with column headers and an example row for importing customer records.
import.step1DescSettings: App settings are imported from a JSON bundle previously produced by the Export page (receipt layout, invoice defaults, currency rates, favorites). No template is needed — just export once and edit the JSON.
import.settingsNoTemplate: App settings don't use a template. Export the current settings from the Export page to get a JSON bundle you can edit and re-import.
import.templateDownloaded: Template downloaded as {{name}}. Check your Downloads folder or the browser download prompt.
import.targetCatalogDesc: Import product families, variants, and parts.
import.targetCustomersDesc: Import customer records (name, contact info, address).
import.targetSettingsDesc: Import receipt layout, invoice defaults, currency rates, and favorites from a JSON bundle.
import.customerMergedSummary: Customers imported: {{created}} new, {{updated}} updated. Total: {{total}} customers.
import.conflictDuplicateName: Duplicate customer name in file — only the first row will be used

importErrors.missingSheet: Workbook has no sheet named "Products" and no sheets at all.
importErrors.noDataRows: Sheet has no data rows (only a header or empty).
importErrors.badPrice: Price must be a non-negative number.
importErrors.priceZero: Price is 0 — line will be added as a free item.
importErrors.badCurrency: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO code (e.g. USD).
importErrors.badPartPrice: Part #{{index}} price "{{value}}" is not a non-negative number.
importErrors.noPartsWarning: No parts declared — the product will be added with an empty part list.
importErrors.badImage: Image #{{index}} "{{value}}" is not a valid http(s) URL or data: URI.
importErrors.badEmail: "{{value}}" is not a valid email address.

export.title: Export Data
export.subtitle: Export your catalog and invoices to Excel or CSV. Catalog export uses the same column structure as the import template, so you can round-trip (export → edit → re-import).
export.catalogDesc: All product families, variants, parts, and images. Same columns as the import template.
export.invoicesDesc: All saved invoices plus the active one — one row per line item.
export.noFamilies: No families to export. Add products via Catalog Management or import from Excel.
export.formatReferenceDesc: What gets exported in each format.
export.customersDesc: All customer records. Same columns as the customer import template.
export.settingsDesc: Receipt layout, invoice defaults, currency rates, and favorites as a single JSON bundle. Round-trips with the App Settings import target.
export.templateHint: Need the schema? Download a template JSON with empty sections to see the expected structure.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your local catalog data, language, theme, currency rates, and the active invoice.
settings.themeDesc: Choose between light, dark, or follow the system preference.
settings.languageDesc: App language. Affects UI, Excel template, and PDF labels.
settings.currencyDesc: Set the exchange rate relative to USD (1 USD = X target currency). Used when displaying prices across currencies.
settings.invoiceDefaultsDesc: Default paper size, currency, and VAT used when creating new invoices.
settings.catalogActionsDesc: Reset the catalog back to a clean state. Existing data will be lost.
settings.invoiceActionsDesc: Remove every line from the active invoice. Saved invoices are not affected.
settings.dangerZoneDescLocal: Wipe all local data (catalog, invoices, settings) from this device.
settings.dangerZoneDescCloud: Wipe all data from the cloud and this device. This will permanently clear your account.
settings.resetConfirm: Clear the catalog? This cannot be undone.
settings.wipeConfirmLocal: Wipe ALL local data? The app will reload with an empty state.
settings.wipeConfirmCloud: Wipe ALL cloud and local data? This will permanently delete everything in your account and cannot be undone.
settings.appUpdatesDesc: Check for new versions and install updates automatically. Only available in the desktop app.
settings.updateAvailableDesc: Version {{version}} is available. Download and install to update.
settings.cloudSyncEnabled: Cloud sync is on — your data is backed up to your account and available on all your devices.
settings.cloudSyncDesc: Sign in to sync your catalog, customers, and invoices across all your devices. Your data stays private to you.

catalogMgmt.title: Catalog Management
catalogMgmt.subtitle: Add, edit, and delete product families, variants, parts, and categories.
catalogMgmt.noFamilies: No product families yet. Create your first one to get started.
catalogMgmt.noVariants: No variants for this family yet.
catalogMgmt.noParts: No parts declared for this family yet.
catalogMgmt.deleteFamilyConfirm: Delete family "{{name}}" and all its variants?
catalogMgmt.duplicateSku: SKU already exists in this family

receipt.title: Receipt Layout Editor
receipt.subtitle: Customize the customer-facing receipt: drag-drop elements, add custom text and images, edit styles, and persist the layout for future invoices.
receipt.cannotRemoveFixed: This element is part of the default layout and cannot be removed.
receipt.defaultHeader:
Your Company Name
123 Park Avenue, Cityville
Phone: (555) 123-4567 | Email: info@example.com
receipt.defaultTerms:
Terms & Conditions:
Payment due within 30 days.
Thank you for your business!

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Maintain a customer book and browse past invoices. Click a saved invoice to clone it back into the active editor.
customers.name: Customer name
customers.noCustomers: No customers yet. Add one to start building a customer book.
customers.deleteConfirm: Delete customer "{{name}}"? Their saved invoices are not affected.
customers.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Delete invoice "{{number}}"? This cannot be undone.

quote.label: Document type
quote.converted: Converted — this quote is now invoice {{number}}.

favorites.label: Favorites
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Click the star on a product to add it here.

dev.label: DEV
dev.title: Dev Tools — Mock Data
dev.hint: Mock data is tagged with a MOCK- prefix so re-seeding refreshes it. Wipe clears everything.
dev.toastWiped: All app data wiped. Reload to see the empty state.
dev.toastSeedFailed: Mock data seeding failed — check the console.

merge.title: Upload your local data?
merge.summary: You have local data on this device. Upload it to your account so you can access it from any device?
